pr.title: WIP: Depth Recurrence — val_bpb 3.2134 (beats baseline by 0.014 BPB at 2.8x fewer params)

output.summary: Shares a few transformer blocks with learned iteration gating to loop through 20+ effective layers inside the 16MB budget.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Not val-only training; project describes weight-shared training validated on MLX plus planned throughput tests.
techniques: Weight-shared transformer blocks iterated multiple times
Learned iteration embeddings with sigmoid gating
